title: Pan-Seared Bass with Sea Crumble Topping
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring flaky sea bass topped with a crunchy sea crumble topping, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Parmesan cheese
ingredients.notes: To add a tangy and savory flavor

instructions: Season the bass fillets with Chinese five-spice powder, sea salt, and black pepper.
Heat the butter in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the bass fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, until browned and cooked through.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix the Panko breadcrumbs and Parmesan cheese in a small bowl.
Top the cooked bass fillets with the breadcrumb mixture and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
